description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design, featuring large, cushioned ear cups that fully enclose the ears for immersive sound isolation. The ear cups are connected by a sturdy, dual-band headband that arches smoothly over the top, providing both support and flexibility. The exterior of the ear cups and headband appears to be made of matte black plastic, with a subtle sheen that suggests a high-quality finish. The padding on the ear cups is thick and likely made of synthetic leather or foam, ensuring comfort during extended use. There are no visible wires, buttons, or branding, giving the headphones a minimalist and streamlined appearance. This type of object is commonly used for personal audio listening in urban environments, such as on public transportation, in parks, or while walking through city streets.
description: A pair of sleek, over-ear headphones with large cushioned ear cups and a dual-band headband, finished in matte black. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the arching dual-band headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the structure of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the symmetry of the ear cups and headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the ear cup's depth and the headband's attachment.
